# James EDrayton

Birth18 MAR 1902 - BANGOR, Walworth County, South Dakota, USA

Death27 September 1969 - Brighton, Adams County, Colorado, USA

MotherMaggie M Gile

FatherWILLIAM J (william James) Drayton (burns)

Show more

Born in **BANGOR, Walworth County, South Dakota, USA** on **18 MAR 1902** to WILLIAM J (william James) Drayton (burns) and Maggie M Gile.James E Drayton married Ellen Marenda "Bunn" Drayton, Reisbig and had 8children.He passed away on **27 September 1969** in **Brighton, Adams County, Colorado, USA**.
